title: Mapping object space dimensions: new insights from temporal dynamics
description: This dataset contains raw MEG and EEG recordings from a study investigating how the brain represents object space dimensions through temporal dynamics analysis. The main folder contains raw MEG data for all participants in BIDS format. The sourcedata folder contains raw EEG data in BDF format along with concurrent behavioral trial data documenting stimulus presentation and trial structure. Participants performed a visual task while neural activity was recorded from both modalities.
methods_description: MEG and EEG data were collected during a visual task (task-targets). MEG data are provided in BIDS format in the main folder. EEG data were recorded in BDF format with event markers and channel information documented. Behavioral trial data including stimulus presentation events are provided in the sourcedata folder in CSV and TSV formats.
